description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, featuring a highly polished, flamed maple top in a warm amber-brown finish. The body is contoured and showcases a visible wood grain pattern, with a darker central stripe running vertically on the back. The front displays two chrome-covered humbucker pickups, a fixed bridge, and four control knobs arranged in a diamond pattern, along with a three-way toggle switch. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, and is fitted with dot inlays along the fretboard. The headstock is angled, with three tuning pegs on each side and a pointed tip, but no visible logo. The overall construction suggests a high-quality instrument suitable for professional use in urban music settings.
description: A polished, single-cutaway electric guitar with a flamed maple top, chrome hardware, and a contoured wooden body with visible grain and dual humbucker pickups.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flamed maple top, chrome pickups, four control knobs, toggle switch, and the full fretboard with dot inlays.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the guitar's slim body depth and the raised bridge and pickups.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the contoured wooden back with a central dark stripe and the smooth neck joint.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the body thickness and the protruding hardware.
attribute_headstock_design: Pointed headstock with three tuning pegs per side, no visible logo, and a simple, angular contour.
